Cancels a scheduled meeting in SavvyCal.
Books a meeting on a scheduling link at: Books a meeting on a scheduling link at a specific time slot.
Returns all events where the attendee's: Returns all events where the attendee's email matches the given address.
Retrieves the profile of the currently a: Retrieves the profile of the currently authenticated SavvyCal user.
Retrieves the details of a specific sche: Retrieves the details of a specific scheduled meeting by its ID.
Returns a list of scheduled meetings fro: Returns a list of scheduled meetings from your SavvyCal account.
Returns all scheduling links configured: Returns all scheduling links configured in your SavvyCal account.
Triggers when a SavvyCal event occurs. S: Triggers when a SavvyCal event occurs. Select one or more event types, or leave empty to trigger on all types.
The unique ID of the event to cancel. Yo: The unique ID of the event to cancel. You can find this from the output of a trigger or the List Events / Get Event actions.
The unique ID of the event. You can find: The unique ID of the event. You can find this in the event URL in SavvyCal, or from the output of a trigger or List Events action.
Select the scheduling link to book a mee: Select the scheduling link to book a meeting on.
Only trigger for events on the selected: Only trigger for events on the selected scheduling links. Leave empty to trigger for all links.
Only return events booked through the se: Only return events booked through the selected scheduling links. Leave empty for all links.
The start date and time of the meeting. Must match an available slot on the scheduling link.
The End date and time of the meeting: The End date and time of the meeting
Full name of the person booking the meet: Full name of the person booking the meeting.
Email address of the person booking the: Email address of the person booking the meeting.
The email address of the attendee to sea: The email address of the attendee to search for.
Only return events that start after this: Only return events that start after this date and time.
Only search events starting after this d: Only search events starting after this date. Use this to limit the search scope and improve performance.
Only return events that start before thi: Only return events that start before this date and time.
Only search events starting before this: Only search events starting before this date.
Filter events by their current status. L: Filter events by their current status. Leave empty to return all statuses.
Maximum number of events to return. Leav: Maximum number of events to return. Leave empty to return all matching events.
Select which event types to trigger on. Leave empty to trigger on all event types.
Failed to load scheduling links. Check y: Failed to load scheduling links. Check your connection.
Filter scheduling links by team. Leave e: Filter scheduling links by team. Leave empty to show all teams.
